---
title: "Skew-adjusted extremized-mean: A simple method for identifying and learning from contrarian minorities in groups of forecasters"
date: 2024-06-11
author: ["Ben Powell", "Ville A Satopää", "Niall MacKay", "Philip E Tetlock"]
publication: "Decision"
categories: ["Statistical Methodolgy"]
url_source: https://eprints.whiterose.ac.uk/id/eprint/188361/1/skew_adjusted_extremized_mean_v5_cleaned_of_comments.pdf
url_preprint: 
journ: "Decision"
issue: 1
volume: 11
page: 173-193
year: 2024
image: image.png
editor: 'source'
---
